title: TechnicalSpecification
description: Phase 2 artifact: Technical Specification. files_likely_touched is required for the implicit-dep gate (ADR-015). Current format: Markdown (validated structurally). Gap 3 transitions this to JSON.

technical_approach.description: How the feature will be implemented technically

architecture_notes.description: Any architectural decisions or constraints relevant to this feature

files_likely_touched.description: Relative file paths the implementation is expected to modify or create. Required for the pre-Code implicit-dep gate (ADR-015 §3b). Post-code, files_actually_touched is derived from git diff --name-only and recorded as a learning signal.

dependencies.description: External package or service dependencies introduced by this feature
